schema.source: string — one of: EU AI Act, ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF, DORA, GDPR, CBUAE AI Principles, RBI AI guidance, AI security news
schema.summary: string — what changed, in plain language
schema.url: string — link to the original publication
schema.substantive: boolean — false for minor edits or duplicate reports

triggers.productUpdate: string or null — which product/resource, or 'not applicable' with a reason
triggers.consultingOpportunity: string or null — who this creates urgency for, or 'not applicable' with a reason
